items.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

items.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
items.summary: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

items.title: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
items.summary: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 「電線杆頂端烏龜」影射習近平 抖音網紅遭全面下架
items.summary: 中國近年來加強對網路內容的審查，尤其是影射最高領導人習近平的文章或影音，不僅會立即遭到下架，發布者的帳號也將被「永遠消失」。  　根據海外中文網站《中國數位時代》旗下專門蒐...…

items.title: 百年沒現蹤珍稀動物？ 在人類面前啪啪超罕見影像曝光！

items.title: 阿聯傳參戰祕密空襲伊朗 以色列鐵穹相助防報復
items.summary: 美國駐以色列大使哈克比（Mike Huckabee）週二（12日）證實，以色列「鐵穹」（Iron Dome）防空系統已進駐阿拉伯聯合大公國，幫助防範伊朗空襲，這是以色列首度承認在...…
